name: Electrical Plug Lockout
shortDescription: Encloses a plug to prevent accidental reconnection during equipment lockout.
longDescription: Fully encloses an electrical plug so it physically cannot be reinserted into a wall outlet while maintenance is underway. The cylinder-style version drops over the plug and closes with an upper plate before locking; both are moulded from rugged, UV-resistant polypropylene. Available in small and large sizes to match plug and cable diameter.

images.alt: Electrical Plug Lockout supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Sizes
specs.value: Small (up to 43mm cable dia.) and large (up to 80mm cable dia.)
